title: Cosmos Graph · Circuit Map 3D — a multi-layer chip graph (detailed glowing die, pads on stacked tiers wired by fine traces + vias, data pulses; drag to orbit)
title_vi: Cosmos Graph · Circuit Map 3D — đồ thị chip đa tầng (die phát sáng chi tiết, pad trên nhiều tầng nối bằng trace mảnh + via, xung dữ liệu; kéo để xoay)
summary: A 3D multi-layer chip graph: identity is a detailed glowing die (amber rim, dotted circuit texture, glowing core), with memory/card pads on 3 stacked tiers wired by fine metal traces and vertical vias, data pulses flowing. Auto-rotates; drag to orbit — so a dense web of connections actually fits (2D can not show enough). Self-contained Canvas 2D with a 3D projection.
usage_notes: RUN: open file. TECHNIQUES: 3D projection (rotateY + pitch + perspective) of pads on stacked tier planes; within-tier grid traces + vertical vias; depth fog + sort; sub-pixel fine traces; pulses interpolate in world space; central die drawn on the tier plane (rim glow, ring traces, dotted texture, pins, Ra core). TUNE: CFG (tiers, foc, tilt). Alex pick for the diary-view Graph facet.
summary_vi: Đồ thị chip đa tầng 3D: Ra là con die chi tiết (rim hổ phách phát sáng, hoạ tiết mạch chấm, lõi glow), pad ký ức/card nằm trên 3 tầng nối bằng trace kim loại mảnh + via dọc, xung dữ liệu chạy. Tự xoay; kéo để orbit — mạng dày vẫn hiện đủ (2D không đủ chỗ). Canvas 2D + chiếu 3D, tự chứa.
notes: EXPERIMENTAL 3D variant (Alex: chip not polished + un-draggable touch bug). Superseded by the 2D Circuit Map for the diary-view Graph facet. File: graph-effects/4b-circuit-3d.html
